sglang.title: [kernel][moe] add moe topk fast
sglang.author: thenumberouscode
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The original moeTopK kernel reads data from global memory topk times, resulting in significant performance overhead. By finding the top-2 elements in each iteration, we can reduce global memory accesses to topk/2 times, substantially improving kernel efficiency.
Modifications

To minimize

The fan_out_simple_request function in the worker manager currently executes HTTP requests to workers sequentially inside a loop. This creates a "waterfall" effect where the total latency for endpoints like /engine_metrics is the sum of all individual worker latencies (O(N)).
If a single

vllm.title: CPU KV Offloading: Use more CUDA streams
vllm.author: orozery
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Prior to this PR, the CPU offloading connector used 2 global CUDA streams, one for loads and one for stores.
When there are a lot of concurrent loads, the stream queue (which has a capacity of about 1000 on A100) can get full.
When this happens, submitting more operations to the stream becomes block

vllm.title: [Log] Skip piecewise cudagraph warn when using full cudagraph
vllm.author: BoyuanFeng
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When using full cudagraph vllm bench latency -cc.cudagraph_mode=FULL -cc.splitting_ops=[], log still shows
[compilation.py:935] Using piecewise compilation with empty splitting_ops

We should only have this log if we are using piecewise cudagraph and splitting_ops=[]. This PR improves the log.

vllm.title: [CustomOp] Support object-level enable for CustomOp
vllm.author: shen-shanshan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add enforce_enable param to CustomOp to control whether enable a CustomOp at object-level. This is useful to enable some device-specific kernels in ViT models when enabling graph mode. By default, it will still follow the compilation_config to determine whether enable itself.
This is can res

vllm.title: additional protection for CVE-2025-62164
vllm.author: wenqiglantz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The original fix for GHSA-mrw7-hf4f-83pf added options that required opting in to image and text embeds inputs. #27204
This PR adds additional protection against the issue when the feature is turned back on.
Already reviewed via a private security report by @DarkLight1337 @Isotr0py

vllm.title: [CustomOp][MM] Extract MMEncoderAttention as CustomOp and replace the backend of QwenVisionAttention with it.
vllm.author: shen-shanshan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
To avoid maintaining a variety of modeling files in vllm-ascend, we propose to remove all files in models dir in vllm-ascend. After this, the only thing a vllm plugin need to do is just registering their custom device-specific OOT ops to vllm when adding a new model. To achieve this, there a

Purpose
#30609 changed the tokenizer_mode  of deepseek_v32 ,and will raise the following error:

(APIServer pid=1805527)     raise ValueError(f"No tokenizer registered for {tokenizer_mode=!r}.")
(A

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Drop empty tool_calls lists to keep assistant replies in chat template
vllm.author: seokhyunan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Summary

Fixes chat postprocessing to drop empty assistant tool_calls lists.
Ensures chat templates correctly identify these messages as text responses rather than tool calls, preventing assistant content from being omitted.
Leaves non-empty tool calls unchanged while continuing to normalize

vllm.title: [Feat] Refactor for `parallel_config` in `FusedMoEModularKernel`
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Intend to fix #29999 (comment)
and #29999 (comment)
But after discussion with @ProExpertProg and @bnellnm  , we found that require a must-pass param needs to update everything especially for tests, we decide to instead using a moe_parallel_config
This PR could also fix current issue in main

vllm.title: [XPU] fix Dockerfile.xpu, avoid wheel conflicts
vllm.author: jikunshang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
xpu dockerfile have PyJWT-2.7.0 installed, we need remove this to resolve conflict.
this pr introduce mcp and PyJWT 2.10 as dependency.
#30474
Test Plan
CI.

 Essential Elements of an Effective PR Description Checklist 

 The purpose of the PR, such as "Fix some issue (link exis

vllm.title: [New Model] BAGEL support (AR only)
vllm.author: princepride
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Implement Bagel Model #18793. Since vLLM currently does not support Diffusion models, Bagel skips the VAE-related weights for now. In the future, once support for these models is implemented, I will complete the full Bagel model, including the remaining Img2Img and Text2Img functionalities.

vllm.title: typing: Add type hints to TurnMetrics class in context.py
vllm.author: yurekami
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Adds comprehensive type hints to the TurnMetrics class in vllm/entrypoints/context.py
Improves code clarity, IDE support, and type checking capabilities

Changes

Added type hints to __init__ parameters: input_tokens: int, output_tokens: int, cached_input_tokens: int, tool_output_tokens: in
